rdf:Description.dc:publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft,

rdf:Description.dcterms:hasPart: Booklet of prayer that came down from heaven for a nobleman in the land of the Afrǝgi
Prayer of the Disciples for forgiveness of sin, ጸሎት፡ ስርየተ፡ ኃጢአት፡
The prayer, “God of the luminaries,” እግዚአብሔር፡ ዘብርሃናት፡
The prayer, “I take refuge,” ጸሎተ፡ ተማኅፀንኩ፡
